info.title: TatkalDoctor Doctor Listing API
info.description:
Core registry API for the TatkalDoctor ecosystem.

## Authentication

### Public Endpoints
`GET /api/v1/health` is public — no authentication required.

### Admin Login (Sanctum)
Call `POST /api/v1/login` with email + password to receive a Bearer token.

### HMAC-SHA256 (All Data Endpoints)
All master data and listing endpoints require four request headers:

| Header | Description |
|---|---|
| `X-Api-Key` | Client API key issued by super admin |
| `X-Timestamp` | Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC) |
| `X-Nonce` | Random string ≥ 8 chars, unique per request |
| `X-Signature` | HMAC-SHA256 hex-encoded signature |

**String to sign** (fields joined by `\n`):

```
HTTP_METHOD
TIMESTAMP
NONCE
REQUEST_PATH
SHA256(body)
```

> Timestamp must be within **±5 minutes** of server time. The `REQUEST_PATH` is the URL path only — no query string. For GET requests, `SHA256(body)` is the SHA-256 of an empty string.

post.description: Authenticates a super_admin, admin, or user and returns a Sanctum Bearer token.

get.description: Returns the current health status of the API. No authentication required.
Returns paginated active, verified doctor listings. Supports filtering by location, service, qualification and free-text search. Requires HMAC authentication.

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: Filter by ISO alpha-3 country code

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Filter by service ID (from /services). Matches both parent and child services.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search on doctor name or hospital name

get.summary: Get doctor profile by QR slug
get.description: Returns a full active, verified doctor profile by its QR slug. Used by public profile pages accessible via QR code scan. This route must be called **before** `/listings/{uuid}` to avoid parameter collision. Requires HMAC authentication.

parameters.name: qrSlug
parameters.description: Unique QR slug generated when a listing is approved (e.g. dr-ravi-kumar-550e8400)

404.description: Listing not found (no active approved listing with this slug)

get.description: Returns a full active, verified doctor profile by its UUID. The response includes all profile fields, contact details, qualifications, services and QR data. Requires HMAC authentication.

404.description: Listing not found (no active approved listing with this UUID)

get.description: Returns all countries available on the platform, sorted A→Z. Requires HMAC authentication.
Returns all active cities for the given ISO alpha-3 country code, sorted A→Z. Requires HMAC authentication.

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (case-insensitive, e.g. IND, USA, GBR)

get.description: Returns all active locations for the given city ID, sorted A→Z. Requires HMAC authentication.
Returns all active parent services with their active child (sub) services, sorted A→Z. Use service IDs to filter doctor listings. Requires HMAC authentication.
Returns all active medical qualifications sorted A→Z (e.g. MBBS, MD, BDS). Use qualification IDs to filter doctor listings. Requires HMAC authentication.
Returns all settings flagged as public as a flat key → value object. Useful for configuring client apps (e.g. site name, support contact, feature flags). Requires HMAC authentication.

success.description:
Reusable OpenAPI schema definitions.
Referenced via $ref: '#/components/schemas/{name}'.

message.example: Error message describing what went wrong

Service.description: Parent service with nested child services

PublicSettings.description: Public platform settings — a flat key-value object

ListingSearch.description: Doctor listing — compact search result item

HmacTimestamp.description: Current Unix timestamp (UTC). Must be within ±5 minutes of server time.
HmacTimestamp.name: X-Timestamp

HmacNonce.description: A random string (min 8 chars) unique per request.
HmacNonce.name: X-Nonce

HmacSignature.description:
HMAC-SHA256 hex signature. String to sign: "METHOD
TIMESTAMP
NONCE
PATH
SHA256(body)".
HmacSignature.name: X-Signature

tags.name: System

tags.name: Auth

tags.name: Master Data
tags.description: Countries, cities, locations, services and qualifications — HMAC protected
